name: Kay's Favorite Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 Beef bouillion cube; 1/2 cup boiling water
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a shallow 8-inch baking pan with foil.
3. Dissolve the beef bouillion cube in boiling water in a large bowl.
4. Add all other ingredients except the catsup and blend well with a fork.
5. Turn mixture onto foil in the pan and shape into a 6 by 4 1/2 inch by 2 inch loaf.
6. Make a crisscross pattern across the top using the dull edge of a knife.
7. Spread catsup across the top.
8. Cover loaf with a tent of foil that does not touch the top.
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
10. Remove foil and bake, uncovered, another 45 minutes.
11. Remove from oven and let cool in pan for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Nutritive values per serving (large slice, 4 1/2 by 2 by 1 inch, 1/6 of loaf):
Food Exchange: 2 MEDIUM-FAT MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 5g; PRO: 19g; FAT: 10g; CAL: 267;
Sodium diets: Substitute a low-sodium bouillion cube.
Nutritive values per serving (medium slice, 4 by 2 by 3/4 inch, 1/8 of loaf):
Food Exchange: 2 MEDIUM-FAT MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
CHO: 5g; PRO: 19g; FAT: 10g; CAL: 189;
Sodium diets: Substitute a low-sodium bouillion cube.
